acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-nodejs SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The nodejs team is responsible for maintain the nodejs-related packages for OpenEuler.. The SIG has 7 core members and maintains 361 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-nodejs SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-nodejs SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-nodejs SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-nodejs SIG maintains 361 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-nodejs.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-nodejs SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-nodejs SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: feng Hu, yuhang zheng, huaxin Lu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
